channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pakistan Permits Iran to Use Airfields for Aircraft
item.description: U.S. officials report Pakistan allowed Iran to park military aircraft, potentially avoiding American airstrikes.

item.title: Lawyers seek to disqualify prosecutors in Cole Allen case
item.description: Defense attorneys are petitioning to remove prosecutors from the shooting investigation involving Cole Allen.

item.title: Coast Guard Seizes Hooker's Boat After Incident in Bahamas
item.description: The U.S. Coast Guard has taken possession of the boat belonging to Brian and Lynette Hooker.

item.title: Hantavirus vs. COVID: What Experts Are Saying
item.description: Experts state the hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship poses minimal risk to the general population.
